description: VR rehabilitation for left homonymous hemianopia with EEG neurofeedback

wiki.notes: Karpathy ingest pattern — compiled from sessions, research docs, scripts. Load index.md first, pull pages on-demand. 2026-05-14 research audit added 20+ verified citations + 3 citation corrections. 2026-05-16 Phase 1 scaffold session updated unity-architecture, rehabilitation-roadmap, audiovisual-training-protocol, hardware-setup. 2026-05-26 research-ops sprint added source queue, YouTube/X validation ladder, sprint reports, QEEG/tPBM watchlist, medication doctor brief, Obsidian HTML wrap-up, and Dr. Jacquemin NegletFix doctor brief with mobile HTML/PDF copies. 2026-05-30 guided Quest pilot session updated audiovisual-training-protocol, unity-architecture, hardware-setup, rehabilitation-roadmap, and index module readiness after on-headset AV validation.

contrast-sensitivity-test.notes: Hemifield positioning fixed. First baseline recorded 2025-12-15. LCD-vs-printed Zeri 2018 caveat added to wiki 2026-05-14: results valid for within-instrument tracking only.

eeg-integration.notes: Muse headband integration via Mind Monitor OSC - decoupled from v1 critical path. RewardController.RewardMode.OpenLoop is default; EegGated reserved for v2 after Muse signal-quality validation per Treves 2025 JMIR meta-analysis.

audiovisual-training.notes: Phase 1 scaffold complete 2026-05-16 (commits ecf327f + 7ea389c + 24a3075 on main). Paradigm B (congruent-pair), Alharshan 2026 dose (30 min × 5×/week × 6 weeks = 15hr). Headless PlayMode smoke test passed 2026-05-30: shortened session completed and trial CSV opened/closed after fixing trialLogger dependency initialization. Quest/InputSystem response binding added 2026-05-30; strengthened smoke test simulates Space via Unity.InputSystem.TestFramework and verifies at least one hit/reward plus hit CSV columns. Manual smoke scene `Assets/Scenes/AVTrainingManualSmoke.unity` generated and placed first in Build Settings. Quest manual smoke passed 2026-05-30 on Quest 2 after adding UnityEngine.XR fallback polling: log showed `Oculus Touch Controller OpenXR/triggerButton`, reward events fired, pulled CSV `SmokeResults/av_training_2026-05-30_14-23-19.csv` with 44 rows / 42 hits. Follow-up guard added so in-flight trials cannot create extra logs after training ends; Android smoke APK rebuilt successfully at `Unity/NeglectFix/Builds/AVTrainingManualSmoke.apk`. Generated fallback visual stimulus upgraded from sphere to flat contrast-controlled disk/Gabor quad on 2026-05-30. `Assets/Scenes/AVTrainingSession1Pilot.unity` added as a short 30s baseline + 5min training + 30s cooldown pilot scene. Quest Session 1 pilot passed on-device 2026-05-30: `Builds/AVTrainingSession1Pilot.apk` installed/launched on Quest 2, right trigger responses registered, training ended at 136 trials / 135 hits, cooldown completed, session log stopped at 3233 samples, and trial CSV closed cleanly at `SmokeResults/Pilot/av_training_2026-05-30_17-09-55.csv`. Ready prompt/countdown added 2026-05-30: TaskManager now supports a pre-baseline Ready phase; AudioVisualTraining shows a world-space headset prompt, waits for trigger/Space confirmation, then runs a countdown before baseline/data collection starts. PlayMode smoke passed and `Builds/AVTrainingSession1Pilot.apk` rebuilt successfully with the prompt. UX follow-up: prompt worked in headset, but 5s countdown + 6min pilot was too long for non-result validation; Session 1 countdown reduced to 2s and `Assets/Scenes/AVTrainingQuickReadyCheck.unity` / `Builds/AVTrainingQuickReadyCheck.apk` added for ~15s prompt/controller checks. Quick Ready Check passed on Quest 2: trigger at 17:49:09, Ready complete at 17:49:10, training began at 17:49:12, session ended at 17:49:24 with 9 trials / 9 hits; Eric confirmed the shorter timing felt better. Completion message added 2026-05-30: after cooldown/log shutdown the headset shows `SESSION COMPLETE` and `You can remove the headset now.` PlayMode smoke now asserts this message and passed; `Builds/AVTrainingSession1Pilot.apk` rebuilt successfully with the finish message. Left-field visibility fix completed 2026-05-30: Quick Ready Check now resets saved smoke state on startup, uses Eric baseline left=0/right=2.25, clamps validation contrast high, uses 8° markers, shows a visible 2s CALIBRATING phase, and starts at left -5°/-8° instead of stale right-field 45°/55°. Quest quick check passed at 22:03 with proximity override: 9/9 hits, all left hemifield, avg RT 435ms, logs pulled to `SmokeResults/QuickReadyCheckLatest/`. Rebuilt full `Builds/AVTrainingSession1Pilot.apk` with the same left-field/calibration fixes for the next longer headset validation. Controlled background fix added 2026-05-30 after Eric saw Quest camera/passthrough behind the app: AudioVisualTraining now creates an opaque camera-locked gray backdrop behind prompts/stimuli, prompt panel alpha increased, QuickReadyCheck and Session1Pilot APKs rebuilt successfully with serialized backdrop settings. Unity CLI PlayMode rerun exited cleanly but did not emit XML, so fresh PlayMode verification for this specific change remains pending. Quest Quick Ready Check after controlled backdrop fix completed at 22:41 with 9/9 hits, all left hemifield, avg RT ~389ms; logs pulled to SmokeResults/QuickReadyCheckOpaque. Subjective visual confirmation of backdrop/marker visibility remains pending because device mirror screenshot was black. Eric confirmed after the 22:41 Quick Ready Check that the controlled background was gray in-headset and markers were visible; this validates the passthrough visibility fix subjectively and objectively. Guided pilot flow added 2026-05-30: AV training now shows a small center fixation cross, explicit instruction that this is rehab training rather than a contrast test, a short unlogged practice block before recorded trials, and keeps practice out of the CSV/staircase. Session1Pilot preset shortened to 5s calibration + 15s practice + 120s recorded block + 5s cooldown for flow validation. PlayMode smoke passed at `SmokeResults/playmode-av-guided-pilot-results.xml`; Session1Pilot and QuickReadyCheck APKs rebuilt successfully. Updated Session1Pilot APK was installed and completed on Quest 2 at 23:27 local time: 45 recorded trials, 33 hits (73.3%), all left hemifield, avg hit RT ~475ms, trial CSV `SmokeResults/GuidedPilot/av_training_2026-05-30_23-25-27.csv`, session CSV `SmokeResults/GuidedPilot/session_2026-05-30_23-24-58.csv`; app force-stopped afterward. Eric said the guided flow is good and the cross helped him stay anchored, but the experience was emotionally heavy because audio confirmed unseen left markers; next iteration should consider sparse right-hemifield control trials without diluting left-field rehabilitation dose.

quest-dev-mode.notes: Quest 2 paired to Eric's Meta account 2026-05-16. April 27 blocker resolved: factory reset + re-pair (not org-membership invite as previously theorized). adb authorized, serial 1WMHH831TR1047, Android 14. USB ADB became intermittent again on 2026-05-30; raw `adb connect 10.0.0.136:5555` initially returned connection refused and `adb mdns services` found no wireless debugging services. Added `scripts/quest-adb.sh` helper to switch to/cache Wi-Fi ADB after a USB connection. MQDH restored USB detection; `scripts/quest-adb.sh enable-wifi` succeeded and Wi-Fi ADB is now cached at `10.0.0.136:5555`. Use `scripts/quest-adb.sh install-run` / `logs` for future loops. For off-face development, the Quest may enter `HEADSET_UNMOUNTED` and sleep; `adb shell am broadcast -a com.oculus.vrpowermanager.prox_close` worked on 2026-05-30 and persists until headset reboot.

xr-plugin-management.notes: OpenXR + Meta Quest Support + Oculus Touch profile configured 2026-05-16. SSAO renderer feature disabled 2026-05-30 as Quest performance/polish cleanup.

baseline_results.notes: First validated measurement after fixing hemifield bug. LogCS values valid for within-instrument tracking only (Zeri 2018 LCD caveat). Expected outcome ranges revised per Yang/Cavanaugh/Saionz 2023: ~50-60% response rate at trained locations, blind-field CS stays ~4x lower than intact even with training.

next_actions: Quest 3 acquisition when budget allows (used via Back Market ~€350-450)
Phase 2 launch: 30-session Paradigm B program with mid-program CS checks
